add_key.summary: Identify instrument-cluster or KESSY configuration, obtain supported security data, prepare the dealer key and adapt it.

all_keys_lost.summary: Use the supported cluster or KESSY security-data route and complete dealer-key preparation and AKL adaptation.

add_key.summary: Confirm the fitted dashboard/KESSY system and use only an explicitly supported Add Key route.

all_keys_lost.summary: Complete the supported security-data acquisition and AKL route after exact module identification.
